items.title: ‘We were at their mercy’: inside the Amazon tactics that hiked prices across the internet
items.summary: Internal emails revealed in court and interviews with ex-employees describe how Amazon’s practices drove up prices for competitors like Walmart and Target. Amazon denies price-fixing claims and says it works to lower costs for consumersA “modern leather” table lamp, listed online at Walmart, shot up from $24.99 to $39.
items.audio: audio/We were at their mercy__ inside the Amazon tactic.mp3

items.title: easyJet flight forced to return to Tenerife after '10-person brawl' breaks out on board
